description: A bioengineer provided a stack of raw TIFF images exported from a legacy CT scanner, but the spatial metadata was lost. The protocol log states the pixel spacing is 0.957 mm (both X and Y) and slice thickness is 1.5 mm. Import the TIFF images from '~/Documents/raw_tiff_stack/' into InVesalius and configure the voxel spacing to these values to restore dimensional accuracy. Create a 3D surface model using the 'Bone' threshold and export the surface as a binary STL file to '~/Documents/calibrated_model.stl'.
